papers.tldr_zh: Video Friday is your weekly selection of awesome robotics vi
papers.cover_zh: Video Friday is your weekly selection of awesome robotics vi
papers.abstract_zh: Video Friday is your weekly selection of awesome robotics videos, collected by your friends at IEEE Spectrum robotics. We also post a weekly calendar of upcoming robotics events for the next few months. Please send us your events for inclusion. ICRA 2026 : 1–5 June 2026, VIENNA RSS 2026 : 13–17 July 2026, SYDNEY Summer School on Multi-Robot Systems : 29 July–4 August 2026, PRAGUE

papers.title: Robot Talk Episode 154 – Visual navigation in insects and robots, with Andrew Philippides

papers.cover_zh: Claire chatted to Andrew Philippides from the University of
papers.abstract_zh: Claire chatted to Andrew Philippides from the University of Sussex about what we can learn from ants and bees to improve robot navigation. Andrew Philippides is a Professor of Biorobotics at the University of Sussex, where he co-directs the Centre for Computational Neuroscience and Robotics and the be.AI Leverhulme Doctoral centre for Biomimetic Embodied AI. […]
